title: Staging Draft Education Playbook
subtitle: Unsubmitted creator draft coverage
description: A representative staging draft that remains editable so creator save and resume flows can be validated without affecting moderation queues.

title: Staging Submitted Business Brief
subtitle: Moderation queue coverage
description: A representative submitted manuscript used to validate admin review queues, ownership boundaries, and pre-approval visibility in staging.

title: Staging Approved Fiction Sampler
subtitle: Ready-to-publish approval coverage
description: A representative approved title used to validate post-review states, pricing controls, and creator visibility before publication.

title: Staging Published Reader Owned Guide
subtitle: Owned library and consumption coverage
description: A representative published title that is pre-purchased by the reader test account so library access and manuscript download can be validated immediately.

title: Staging Published Reader Available Guide
subtitle: Available-for-purchase coverage
description: A representative published title left unowned so the reader smoke flow can exercise purchase, balance deduction, and ownership transition in staging.

title: Staging Rejected History Manuscript
subtitle: Creator rejection recovery coverage
description: A representative rejected book used to validate creator visibility into rejection reasons and resubmission messaging in staging.
rejectionReason: Representative rejection path for staging review coverage.

title: Staging Unpublished Science Manual
subtitle: Removed-from-catalog coverage
description: A representative unpublished title used to validate catalog exclusion, creator retention, and post-publication admin controls in staging.
unpublishReason: Representative unpublish path for staging catalog exclusion coverage.
